name: Palona AI
one_liner: Emotionally intelligent AI sales agents for D2C and retail brands. OpenAI partnership. Ex-Google VP and ex-Meta VP founders.

founders.name: Maria Zhang
founders.background: Former VP of Engineering at Google. Former VP and GM of AI for Products at Meta.

founders.name: Steve Liu
founders.background: AI infrastructure and research.

name: Dexmate
one_liner: Mobile humanoid robots for logistics and manufacturing. Vega robot with 36+ DOF, 15kg payload, 20hr battery. NVIDIA Inception.

founders.name: Tao Chen
founders.background: PhD MIT CSAIL. BS Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Reinforcement learning and robot control.

founders.name: Yuzhe Qin
founders.background: PhD UCSD. Computer vision and learning from demonstrations. Qualcomm Scholar.

name: Capitol AI
one_liner: Model-agnostic enterprise AI for data storytelling and decision-making. YC S24. Backed by Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky.

founders.name: Shaun Modi
founders.background: Founding designer at Airbnb. 15 patents. Worked at Google, NASA, White House, DoD.

founders.name: Tom Hallaran
founders.background: Directed AI Center of Excellence at US GSA. Built WinRed.

name: Klavis AI
one_liner: Open-source MCP infrastructure for AI agent tool-use at scale. YC X25. Co-author of Gemini paper.

founders.name: Xiangkai Zeng
founders.background: Co-authored Gemini paper. Built tool-calling infra for Gemini at Google DeepMind. CMU MS, Beihang BS.

founders.name: Zihao Lin
founders.background: Former Senior Engineer at Lyft (recommendations). Northeastern MS, Beihang BS.

name: Hirey
one_liner: Chat-based AI hiring app matching employers with verified candidates. $14M Series A from DST Global.

name: Fish Audio
one_liner: AI voice synthesis and text-to-speech. Fish Speech / OpenAudio S1 competing with ElevenLabs. $5M ARR. 420K MAU.

founders.name: Shijia Liao (Leng Yue)
founders.background: Former NVIDIA researcher. Gen Z. 7+ years in speech synthesis. Creator of GPT-SoVITS.

name: Arcee AI
one_liner: Enterprise AI platform powered by small language models (SLMs). Arcee Orchestra agentic AI. Backed by Emergence Capital and Prosperity7.

founders.name: Mark McQuade
founders.background: Former early employee at Hugging Face. Led monetization strategy.

founders.name: Jacob Solawetz
founders.background: Previously at Roboflow (YC). Computer vision/ML.

name: Composio
one_liner: Developer platform for AI agent tool integrations. 100K+ developers, 200+ paying customers. YC-backed. $1M+ ARR.

founders.name: Soham Ganatra
founders.background: IIT Bombay. Founding Engineer at Bureau Inc.

founders.name: Karan Vaidya
founders.background: IIT Bombay. Former Rubrik engineer.

name: Anyware Robotics
one_liner: AI-powered mobile robots for autonomous box unloading in containers and trucks. Pixmo robot for warehouse logistics.

founders.name: Thomas Tang (Te Tang)
founders.background: PhD UC Berkeley. Robotic manipulation and 3D perception research.

founders.name: Bruce Fan
founders.background: PhD UC Berkeley. AI/optimization/control theory for grasping.

founders.name: Samuel Zhou
founders.background: UC Berkeley.

name: Timeplus
one_liner: Streaming SQL database and real-time analytics platform. Open-sourced streaming engine. Backed by Hillhouse Capital.

founders.name: Ting Wang
founders.background: BS & MS Computer Science, Tongji University (Shanghai). Former Splunk, SAP, TalkingData.

name: Chatsimple
one_liner: AI-powered sales assistant / chatbot for websites. Lead generation, qualification, and conversion.

founders.name: Hao Sheng
founders.background: University of Toronto. 6+ years conversational AI. Former Google Dialogflow and Cresta.

name: Mage AI
one_liner: Open-source data pipeline tool for building, running, and managing data pipelines. Originally 'Stripe for AI'.

founders.name: Tommy Dang
founders.background: Former Airbnb engineer. Headed marketing and promotions platform.

founders.name: Xiaoyou Wang
founders.background: Co-founded Mage AI.

name: Boson AI
one_liner: LLM tools for personalized experiences in virtual worlds — storytelling, learning, and insights. CTO is ex-AWS Distinguished Scientist.

founders.name: Alex Smola
founders.background: Turing Award-level ML researcher. Former Distinguished Scientist & VP at AWS. Co-creator of MXNet.

founders.name: Mu Li
founders.background: PhD ML from CMU. BS from Peking University. Former Senior Principal Scientist at AWS. Co-author of 'Dive into Deep Learning'.

name: DBOS
one_liner: Cloud-native OS built on a database-first architecture. Co-founded by PostgreSQL creator (Turing Award) and Apache Spark creator.

founders.name: Michael Stonebraker
founders.background: Turing Award recipient. Creator of PostgreSQL. Founded 6+ data companies.

founders.name: Matei Zaharia
founders.background: Creator of Apache Spark. CTO of Databricks.

founders.name: Qian Li
founders.background: PhD Computer Science Stanford. BS from Peking University.
